-- sluice schema preview
-- source: postgres (1 tables, 3 columns)
-- target: mysql
-- mappings applied: 0
-- advisory hints: 2

-- ──────────── users ────────────
-- 3 columns; 2 cross-engine translations; 2 hints

CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` CHAR(36) NOT NULL, -- source: uuid -> target: char(36)
  `email` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `bio` LONGTEXT NOT NULL  -- source: text -> target: longtext
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

-- hint: PG uuid expands 2.25x as CHAR(36); for binary storage, override to binary_uuid
--       --type-override users.id=binary_uuid
-- hint: PG text -> MySQL LONGTEXT (4GB cap, large overhead); if column is bounded, override to varchar:length=N or mediumtext
--       --type-override users.bio=mediumtext
